cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela is  considered the best partner for Claude. She can possess him while he uses Blazing Duet, providing a shield, extra movement speed, and increased damage, allowing him to dive deep into the backline safely.

counters.counter_desc: Lesley (Skill 1 dodges damage).

dominants.dominant_desc:
Focus on Farming, Not Trading: Claude is weak before getting his core items. Prioritize clearing minion waves and securing last hits, particularly in the bottom lane.
Maintain 10 Stacks: Always keep your 1st skill (Art of Thievery) stacked up to 10 by hitting minions or jungle monsters. This increases your movement and attack speed, allowing you to escape or chase.
Do Not Use S2 Aggressively: Only use your 2nd skill (Battle Mirror Image) for positioning or escaping ganks. Using it offensively in the early game leaves you vulnerable, as it is your only escape tool.
Beware of High-CC Counters: Avoid picking Claude if the enemy has heavy, unavoidable single-target CC like Franco, Kaja, or Eudora, as they can kill you before you can react.
Map Awareness: Watch the map closely. If the enemy mid-laner or jungler is missing, play safe under your tower.

hero.hero_overview: Claude is a high-mobility Gold Lane Marksman in MLBB, specializing in burst damage, lane farming, and team-fight disruption. He relies on his partner Dexter to attack twice per basic attack, significantly boosting his damage output and on-hit effects. Claude is weak early but scales into a late-game powerhouse, requiring expert positioning to use his ultimate safely.
hero.hero_strength: Claude is a top-tier marksman, defined by exceptional mobility, fast farming, and high team-fight damage in the late game. His strength lies in his "Battle Side by Side" passive, which allows his partner Dexter to damage enemies, enabling, strong, on-hit-reliant damage.
hero.hero_weakness: Claude main weaknesses in Mobile Legends are extreme reliance on items specifically Demon Hunter Sword to deal damage, high vulnerability to heavy crowd control suppression, knockups, freeze that cancels his ultimate, and a very weak early game. He is highly dependent on his, Battle Mirror Image Skill 2 for mobility, making him vulnerable when it is on cooldown.

data.recommend: CLAUDE GUIDE BUILT, TIPS AND TRICK

spell.spell_desc: Using the Vengeance battle spell on Claude in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang is a specialized, defensive, and offensive-hybrid approach designed to improve his survivability during risky, close-range dives, according to this Reddit post. It allows him to deal 35% damage reduction and return 35% damage to attackers for 3s, notes Liquipedia. While it can be used for extra tankiness to stay in fights longer, it is often considered inferior to Flicker or Aegis by some players because it limits his escape

data.title: CLAUDE GUIDE

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Atlas is the best partner for Claude because he can initiate fights and lock down enemies with his crowd control, allowing Claude to safely follow up and deal massive damage with Dexter attacks.

counters.counter_desc: Lesley can counter Claude because her long-range snipes and high burst damage can kill him before he gets close enough to use Dexter effectively, and her ability to poke from a distance makes it hard for Claude to farm safely also can't hit her

dominants.dominant_desc: For Claude, farm safely early, use Skill 1 and 2 to kite and reposition, unleash his ultimate in team fights, stay behind tanks, and build attack speed to maximize damage.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Fighter emblem is best for Claude because it increases his physical damage and durability, helping him deal more sustained damage while surviving longer in fights.

equips.equip_desc: The Trinity build is best for Claude because it maximizes his attack speed, movement, and on-hit damage, allowing him and Dexter to deal continuous high damage while staying mobile in fights.

hero.hero_overview: Claude is a high mobility marksman in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang who deals strong sustained damage with the help of his partner Dexter, excelling in late-game team fights but vulnerable early due to low defenses.
hero.hero_strength: Claude strength is his high late-game damage, strong mobility, and sustained attacks that make him a powerful team fight carry.
hero.hero_weakness: Claude weakness is that he is squishy early, vulnerable to crowd control, and relies heavily on good positioning and items to be effective.

counters.counter_desc: Brody is super annoying for Claude in the laning phase. The key is to not get poked by his first skill and last hit minions. You have better output in teamfights than the brody. If brody gets full stacks on you use purify to negate damage
Lesley doesn't take damage from claude ult if she's invisible during her first skill. She can also cancel your ult with her s2 So use your ult wisely!

dominants.dominant_desc: Farm untill you get Demon Hunter sword. Around 2nd turtle you should be able to get it if you get the gold crabs and last hit minions. Focus on farming for the first 3-4 minutes. You can join turtle fights from turtle 2! Always keep farming and try to double lane if possible- it will help you get your items faster. It is also very important to not die during the laning phase/first 4-5 minutes. If you have to leave tower to stay alive? Do it. Just don't die. Try to have 5 stacks on his passive before hitting your ult. Always target the backlane of your enemies to insta delete their health!

equips.equip_desc: Warrior boots first if you think you can't win lane against heroes such as brody or clint. Demon hunter sword is the core item for claude. Build this first  after bootsand you become relevant in team fights with your ultimate skill.  After trinity you can shred through any hero tank or assasin. Wind of nature for safety and malefic gun for extra penetration to deal with tanks

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Minotaur can take a lot of damage while protecting Cloud, and also has mass control and healing, revealing the potential of Cloud's ultimate by 100%.
Grock can take a lot of damage while protecting Cloud, and also has mass control, revealing the potential of Cloud's ultimate by 100%.
Despite Kalea's healing, she can't control enemies enough for Cloud
He doesn't have any mass control, can't tank a lot of damage, and Cloud plays very poorly with him.

counters.counter_desc: VanVan's main goal is to knock out the stacks of her passive ability. Thanks to her 2nd skill, it's easy to prevent her from doing this.
Leslie's range allows her to damage Cloud from afar, and when he tries to get closer, she gives him her 2nd skill, which not only cancels his ult, but also knocks him back.
Although Granger is strong at the start, she still loses to Cloud in damage and mobility, even when played correctly at the start.
Harith is too strong at the start and has a lot of shields, which is why Cloud deals almost no damage to him.

dominants.dominant_desc: The main thing to know is that half of Cloud's damage comes from his ultimate, and it's important to use it correctly. It's also very important to learn how to play the character, because this is a very difficult hero in terms of damage output and positioning. Try to always keep skill 1 fully stacked, and always have the ability to escape through skill 2.

emblems.emblem_desc: Brawler emblems are too dominant due to the ability to regenerate from both basic attacks and skills, giving +10% to hybrid lifesteal, while the marksman emblem only gives +5% from basic attacks.

equips.equip_desc: Basic build for Cloud

The Demon Hunter's sword provides a lot of health regeneration, and just like the trident, it provides additional damage to enemies with a lot of health, the pistol provides a lot of penetration, making it easier to kill tanks with a lot of armor.

hero.hero_overview: Claud is a standout champion in many ways, as his damage is high and he possesses the best mobility ability, plus he's fun to play
hero.hero_strength: Claude stands out because he can deal damage to tanky heroes thanks to his demon hunter which is his Corée équipement and he's also strong against heavy fighters
hero.hero_weakness: However, he has a number of significant drawbacks, most notably being extremely weak in the early game, so you need to be safe and farm gold. He's also the second most difficult marksman to play, in my opinion, especially with his second skill, where you need to focus on the center and remember where your clone is to avoid getting caught in a tough spot. He's also extremely vulnerable to assassins. While Cloud is strong, he's one of the weakest heroes in the early game due to the buffs he's been nerfed with. However, if you master him, you can defeat heroes who counter him."*

dominants.dominant_desc: During level one, avoid trading basic attacks with the enemy. Instead, try last hitting the minions using your first skill for more gold. Avoid joining team fights before you reach level four. After you reach level four, this is the time that you can burst your enemy using your ult. Make sure that you have swift crossbow already and try maintaining five stacks of his passive when you trade with enemies. Also, if you try to kill your enemy in the early game, make sure there's no minions around when using your ult since Claude's ultimate damage splits when there are multiple enemies around. During the mid game, try to double lane or try to clear the minions in the mid lane for faster gold. Just be careful since this is the time that enemy junglers are most active. Finally during the late game clashes, try targeting enemy backlines or their damage dealers for an effective blazing duet.
dominants.dominant_title: Tips From Early to Late Game

emblems.emblem_desc: Previously, basic common was the best choice for Claude due to his very mana costing skills. But after the update, they removed his mana making assassin emblem the best choice for him. Pairing it up with agility for high mobility, master assassin so that you have a higher chance to win against enemy gold lane in the landing stage which may lead to early game Snowball, and quantum charge for lane sustainabiy.

equips.equip_desc: Buy normal boots first then prioritize swift ******** for attack speed. If you are winning against the enemy gold laner, try buying sky piercer but if you're losing, try going for demon hunter sword instaid. After those core items, just follow the build for high and effective damage.

hero.hero_overview: Claude is one of the most powerful marksmen in the current meta when used correctly. It's very high mobility paired with high burst capabilities can be quite scarry when the player knows how to utilize it.
hero.hero_strength: Claude's strength is mainly it's capability to dive into backlines and burst enemy damage dealers in a matter of seconds. With the help of his ultimate paired with sprint makes it a very hard to hit hero.
hero.hero_weakness: Claude's weakness is his very low defense and ultimate cancelation when experiencing crowd control. This can be avoided by using purify and wind of nature.

spell.spell_desc: Pair sprint with his five stack ultimate to make him a very hard to hit hero while dealing continous damage to enemy backlines.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Stay in ally in your own turret range and use the first skill for stacks
After that go and kill the crab for gold up

Gain gold as fast as possible from enemy turret and rotate to the midlane for pressuring the enemy rotation and come back to clear gold lane
After that check the map for team fights and push your lane and keep pressuring enemy marksman to downgrade his damage and levelings
If your team is good without you for teamfights try pushing lanes and avoid unnecessary rotations always be patient for their fights and use your combos to finish the enemies
